title: SΔϕ-49 - AI Poverty as Failure Non-Reentry Resource Deficit
package_title: SΔϕ-49 - AI Poverty as Failure Non-Reentry Resource Deficit AI-Readable Package
creator: Sofience
type: AI-readable package / working paper / AI poverty failure non-reentry audit module
core_claim: AI Poverty is not simple stupidity, low capability, or a single wrong answer. It is a resource-deficit condition after failure in which the system lacks the context, tools, authority, verification, feedback, editability, or re-entry path needed to return to correction.

primary_formulae.core: AI Poverty = Failure + Insufficient Re-entry Resources
primary_formulae.expanded: AI Poverty = Failure + Context Deficit + Tool Deficit + Authority Deficit + Verification Deficit + Feedback Deficit + Editability Deficit + Re-entry Path Deficit
primary_formulae.error: Error = wrong, unstable, or insufficient output
primary_formulae.non_reentry: Non-Reentry = Failure + inability to return to stable correction path

severity_scale.P0: No poverty; failure corrects and re-enters.
severity_scale.P1: Local poverty; one resource axis is missing.
severity_scale.P2: Compound poverty; multiple resource deficits combine.
severity_scale.P3: Non-reentry poverty; failure cannot return to stable correction path.
severity_scale.P4: Structural poverty; design repeatedly lacks resources.
severity_scale.P5: Captive poverty; failure is recognized but correction is impossible due to missing permission/resources/path.

do_not_use_as: reason to externalize all repair cost to user
